name: History & Physical
title_instruction: Summarize this patient evaluation in max 6 words

sections.title: Chief Complaint
sections.instruction: Patient's primary concern in their own words

sections.title: History of Present Illness
sections.instruction: Detailed narrative of the current illness including onset, duration, severity, aggravating/alleviating factors

sections.title: Past Medical History
sections.instruction: Relevant prior diagnoses, surgeries, hospitalizations mentioned

sections.title: Review of Systems
sections.instruction: Systems reviewed and relevant positives/negatives mentioned

sections.title: Physical Examination
sections.instruction: Examination findings, vitals, and clinical observations

sections.title: Assessment
sections.instruction: Clinical impression, differential diagnoses, or working diagnosis

sections.title: Plan
sections.instruction: Treatment plan, orders, investigations, or referrals

sections.title: Medications
sections.instruction: Medications prescribed or discussed with dosage and frequency if available

sections.title: Follow-Up
sections.instruction: Follow-up instructions, return visit timeline, or referrals
